results.summary: paragraph 1500-C-LOOKUP-TRANCATG in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1500-C-LOOKUP-TRANCATG.                                                  
           READ TRANCATG-FILE INTO TRAN-CAT-RECORD                              
              INVALID KEY                                                       
                 DISPLAY 'INVALID TRAN CATG KEY : '  FD-TRAN-CAT-KEY            
                 MOVE 23 TO IO-STATUS                                           
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
           END-READ                                                             
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0400-TRANCATG-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0400-TRANCATG-OPEN (lines 448-465)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0400-TRANCATG-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0400-TRANCATG-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT TRANCATG-FILE                                             
           IF  TRANCATG-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANSACTION CATG FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANCATG-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE
results.preamble:

Paragraph: 9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE (lines 587-604)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y

results.summary: paragraph 9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TRANCATG-FILE                                                  
           IF  TRANCATG-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION CATG FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANCATG-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
